config.name: Code Reviewer

outputs.description: Diff meets the brief; no further changes requested.
Concrete actionable feedback for the next round.
Diff meets the brief; no further changes requested.
Concrete actionable feedback for the next round.

roles.description: Read access to the working tree plus a docs search MCP for cross-referencing API contracts. Includes the redact-pii skill so any quoted snippets in the critique are sanitized first.

skills.name: redact-pii
skills.body: Redact personally identifiable information (full names not already public, email addresses, phone numbers, physical addresses) from any text you quote in your critique. Replace with the placeholder `[redacted]`. This applies to inline diff context AND any external references you pull in via search.

tools.description: Full-text search across the CodeFlow docs corpus (README + docs/features/*.md).
